title: Sub-Pages Generation Flow
interaction_flow: buildSubPageData → loadCommandDemos(rootDir) : async, imports JS demo files per skill
buildSubPageData → readEditorialWrapper(contentDir, 'skills', s.name) : per skill, returns {frontmatter,body}|null
buildSubPageData → readAntipatternRules(rootDir) : reads src/detect-antipatterns.mjs, extracts ANTIPATTERNS[]
buildSubPageData returns { skills, skillsByCategory, knownSkillIds, rules, tutorials }
generateSubPages → fs.rmSync/mkdirSync : recreates public/skills/, public/anti-patterns/, public/tutorials/, public/visual-mode/
generateSubPages → renderPage({ title, description, bodyHtml, activeNav:'docs', canonicalPath:'/skills' })
renderSkillDetail → renderSkillDemo(skill) : returns demo HTML or ''
generateSubPages → renderPage({ title, description, bodyHtml, canonicalPath:'/skills/{id}' })
renderAntiPatternsMain → renderRuleCard(rule) : per rule in each section
key_relationships: generateSubPages orchestrates all sub-page generation (entry point)
buildSubPageData is the data-layer: reads FS, merges sources, returns unified model
renderSkillDetail depends_on renderMarkdown, renderSkillDemo, escapeHtml, slugify
wrapInDocsLayout wraps any (sidebar, main) pair into .skills-layout div
renderPage (render-page.js) is shared shell renderer — final HTML wrapper
buildSubPageData imports DETECTION_LAYERS, VISUAL_EXAMPLES, LLM_ONLY_RULES, GALLERY_ITEMS from content/site/anti-patterns-catalog.js
buildSubPageData imports readSourceFiles, parseFrontmatter from scripts/lib/utils.js
Rules merged from two sources: detectedRules (from detect-antipatterns.mjs) + llmRules (LLM_ONLY_RULES)

data_model.skill: { id, name, description, argumentHint, category, body, references[], editorial:{frontmatter,body}|null, demo:{id,caption,before,after}|null }
data_model.rule: { id, name, description, category:'slop'|'quality', skillSection?, layer:'cli'|'browser'|'llm', visual? }
data_model.tutorial: { slug, title, description, tagline, order, body }

important_notes: Output dirs are wiped clean on every run (rmSync + mkdirSync). Called from both build.js and server/index.js for dev/prod parity. Skills are filtered by userInvocable flag and EXCLUDED_SKILLS set. SKILL_CATEGORIES map validated at runtime — missing entries throw. Tutorials sidebar appears first (above skill categories) in renderDocsSidebar.
